description: M8 retrieval golden set. Recall@K acceptance for `memhub eval retrieval`. Matchers run case-insensitive substring checks against the recall hit's title and body, so queries survive row-ID shifts and minor wording tweaks. `kind: match` queries contribute to Recall@K; `kind: empty` queries are safety probes that must return zero results. Queries are written keyword-style (3-6 specific terms) to play well with recall's AND-of-tokens FTS5 matcher.

queries.notes: Probes the addendum invariant: recall never logs to writes_log.
Stale-embedding UX rule: warning surfaced, agent asks before /reindex.
Load-bearing decision 34 — token-savings rule that makes M8 worthwhile.
Decision 26: contentless FTS5 virtual tables over source tables.
Decision 42: build.rs downloads + SHA-pins BGE-small into OUT_DIR.
Decision 27: eager embed inside the source-write transaction.
Self-referential probe: only passes once M8 decisions are themselves indexed and queryable.
Decision 39: validate_source() at writers, schema stays unconstrained.
Fact 1 in the seeded set — the literal build command.
Fact 2 in the seeded set — the literal test command.
Self-referential probe: the eval harness task itself must be findable via recall.
Safety probe: gibberish must return an empty bundle, never a hallucinated guess.
